title: Professional Coaching Agreement
description: A structured personal development or executive business coaching contract specifying session counts, monthly retainer fees, and scheduling/cancellation policies.
whatsCovered: Definition of coaching engagement (business, career, or personal)
Monthly fees and scheduled sessions allotment
Cancellation and rescheduling notice timelines (e.g. 24-hour notice)
Confidentiality of client business and career history
Disclaimer that coaching is not therapy or psychological counseling
whenToUse: Use this contract when you are an executive coach, life coach, or career consultant providing structured advisory sessions to a client.

fields.label: Coach Office Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 44 Mountain View Road, Boulder, CO 80301

clauses.heading: COACHING SERVICES AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This Coaching Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {coach_name}, located at {coach_address} ("Coach"), and {client_name}, located at {client_address} ("Client").

clauses.heading: 1. Coaching Engagement
clauses.body: Coach agrees to provide Client with {sessions_count} coaching sessions per month, each session lasting approximately 60 minutes. Sessions shall be held via Zoom, telephone, or in-person as mutually agreed.

clauses.heading: 2. Retainer and Payments
clauses.body: Client shall pay Coach a monthly retainer fee of {monthly_fee}, payable in advance on the 1st of each month. Payments are non-refundable once sessions have commenced.

clauses.heading: 3. Cancellation & Rescheduling Policy
clauses.body: Client must provide at least 24 hours' notice to reschedule or cancel a session. Failure to provide 24 hours' notice shall result in the forfeiture of that session without refund.

clauses.heading: 4. Disclaimer and Coaching Limits
clauses.body: Client understands that coaching is not therapy, medical advice, or psychiatric counseling. Coach does not diagnose or treat any mental health disorders, and coaching is not a substitute for professional clinical care.

clauses.heading: 4.1 No Professional Guarantees
clauses.body: Coach makes no financial, career, or personal success guarantees. Client remains fully responsible for implementing advisory feedback and directing their own career/business choices.

clauses.heading: 5. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed by, and interpreted in accordance with, the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I carry over unused sessions to the next month?
faq.answer: No. Unused sessions do not roll over to the next billing cycle. It is up to the client to schedule their monthly sessions.

faq.question: Is coaching confidential?
faq.answer: Yes. All conversations, business plans, and personal records shared during coaching sessions are held in strict privacy.
